mapper.select: SELECT c.mentor_com_id AS mentorComId, c.mentor_com_content AS mentorComContent, TO_CHAR(c.mentor_com_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS mentorComDate, c.member_number AS memberNumber, c.mentorBoard_id AS mentorBoardId, m.member_id AS memberId, m.member_nickname AS memberNickname FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD_COMMENT c JOIN UB_MEMBER m ON c.member_number = m.member_number WHERE c.mentorBoard_id = #{mentorBoardId} ORDER BY c.mentor_com_date ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_mentor_board_comment.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_MENTOR_BOARD_COMMENT (mentor_com_id, mentor_com_content, mentor_com_date, member_number, mentorBoard_id) VALUES (#{mentorComId}, #{mentorComContent}, SYSDATE, #{memberNumber}, #{mentorBoardId})
